DECLARATION OF MATTHEW P.C. NOEL IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY RESPONSES FROM PLAINTIFF FILED BY DEFENDANT WILLIAMS-SONOMA, INC WEST ELM DBA WILLIAMS-SONOMA STORES, INC.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS WILLIAMS-SONOMA, INC. AND WEST ELM DBA WILLIAMS-SONOMA STORES, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY RESPONSES FROM PLAINTIFF IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. WITHIN 10 DAYS, PLAINTIFF SHALL PROVIDE VERIFIED RESPONSES TO THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION, AND PLAINTIFF IS PERMITTED TO RAISE HER 5TH AMENDMENT RIGHT TO NOT INCRIMINATE HERSELF. TO THE EXTENT THAT THE DEFINITION OF "INJURY" IS AT ISSUE, IN EACH OF THESE RESPONSES, PLAINTIFF SHALL IDENTIFY THE INJURY OR INJURIES AND RESPOND SUBSTANTIVELY TO EACH REQUEST. DEFENDANT HAS NOT SUFFICIENTLY DEMONSTRATED THAT THIS ACTION REQUIRES THE EXCESSIVE NUMBER OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES PROPOUNDED, AND IT IS THEREFORE DENIED. (CCP 2030.030(A)(1), 2030.050.) PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, REPORTER: TONY VAUGHN CSR #6185 (302/EHG)

Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Discovery Responses From Plaintiff
Off Calendar Oct-25-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS WILLIAMS-SONOMA, INC. AND WEST ELM DBA WILLIAMS-SONOMA STORES, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY RESPONSES FROM PLAINTIFF.

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Granted, in part, and denied, in part. Within 10 days, Plaintiff shall provide verified responses to the Requests for Admission, and Plaintiff is permitted to raise her 5th Amendment right to not incriminate herself. To the extent that the definition of "injury" is at issue, in each of these responses, Plaintiff shall identify the injury or injuries and respond substantively to each request. Defendant has not sufficiently demonstrated that this action requires the excessive number of special interrogatories propounded, and it is therefore denied. (CCP 2030.030(a)(1), 2030.050.) Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR #6185 (302/EHG)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-23-2013 Continued To Apr-07-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Discovery Responses From Plaintiff
Off Calendar Oct-15-2013 Continued To Oct-25-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance on Tuesday, October 15, 2013:
Monica Burneikis, Esq. of Meisel & Krentsa [415.788.2035] appearing for Plaintiff ERICA SKONE-REES;
Matthew P.C. Noel, Esq. of Manning & Kass Ellrod, Ramirez, Trester LLP [415.217.6990] appearing for Defendants WILLIAMS-SONOMA, INC. and WEST ELM dba WILLIAMS-SONOMA STORES, INC.

Plaintiff's counsel will not stipulate to have this matter heard by the judge pro tem. This matter is argued. Defendants WILLIAMS-SONOMA, INC. and WEST ELM DBA WILLIAMS-SONOMA STORES, INC.'S Motion To Compel Discovery Responses From Plaintiff is continued to October 25, 2013 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302. Judge Pro Tem: David E. May; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash Pltff'S Deposition Subpoena Of Insurance Adjuster Jeffrey A. Roger;
Off Calendar Aug-26-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Matthew P.C. Noel, Esq. of Manning & Kass Ellrod, Ramirez, Trester LLP, Tel. 415.217.6990, for defendant and moving party;
Monica Burneikis, Esq. of Meisel & Krentsa, Tel. 415.788.2035, for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT WILLIAMS-SONOMA, INC. and WEST ELM DBA WILLIAMS-SONOMA STORES, INC.'s Motion To Quash Plaintiff's Deposition Subpoena Of Insurance Adjuster Jeffrey A. Roger is denied without prejudice to making objections at the deposition or at trial. Depositions can be taken of non-percipient witnesses. Defendant has not established that the deposition falls outside the scope of CCP 2017.010 or that it necessarily calls for communications covered by the attorney client privilege. The distance from Concord to San Francisco is not a basis to grant a protective order. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sandra Lee Hockin, CSR # 6185, Tel. 415.433.5777.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash Pltff'S Deposition Subpoena Of Insurance Adjuster Jeffrey A. Roger;

Frank M. La Fleur, Esq. of Manning & Kass, Ellrod, Ramirez, Trester LLP [415.217.6990] appearing for WILLIAMS-SONOMA, INC. and WEST ELM DBA WILLIAMS-SONOMA STORES, INC., defendants / moving parties

Plaintiff's counsel does not stipulate to have the judge pro tem hear this matter. The matter is argued. Defendants WILLIAMS-SONOMA, INC.'S and WEST ELM DBA WILLIAMS-SONOMA STORES, INC.'S Motion to Quash Plaintiff's Deposition Subpoena of Insurance Adjuster Jeffrey A. Roger is continued to August 27, 2013 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302. Judge Pro Tem: Philip M. Andersen; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
